items.title: Man charged with murder after remains believed to be missing woman found in Queensland bushland
items.standfirst: Police say man was found at a home with Jana Armstrong’s four-month old baby, several days after Toowoomba woman was last seenFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastQueensland police have charged a man with murder after remains believed to be a woman missing for several days were found in bushland.As of Sunday morning, the remains were yet to be formally identified but Queensland police investigators believe they are those of Jana Armstrong. items.title: Why pay a premium fee for a service that isn’t? How the nationwide outage could hurt Telstra
items.standfirst: The telco has long banked on its reputation as having the most stable, widest mobile telco coverage. That is now badly dentedFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastTelstra has long profited from its reputation of having the largest and most stable mobile telco coverage in Australia, allowing it to charge premium prices.When its main rival, Optus, suffered a series of operational issues that culminated in a damaging triple zero outage last year, Telstra attracted new customers.
